summary: Iter63 — Pricing page redesign verified end-to-end. Backend: 12/12 pytest green on /app/backend/tests/test_iter63_pricing.py. PRICING_TIERS dict has correct values (start=0, analyze=49, pro=149, scale=0, all eur) and legacy aliases (free, investor, developer) preserved. POST /api/payments/checkout returns valid Stripe session for tier='analyze' and tier='pro' (and legacy 'investor'); short-circuits with 400 'Free tier requires no checkout' for tier='start','scale','free','developer' (amount=0). Regression: /api/dashboard/news strict filter passes (no banned keywords in 12 items), /api/dashboard/competition 200, /api/location/analyze non-500. Frontend /pricing: pricing-page bg = rgb(10,11,15) [dark mode confirmed], pulsing olive kicker 'PROPUL8 · PRICING', headline 'Property intelligence, priced to start small.', tagline 'Start free. Pay when the insight matters. Scale when the portfolio grows.' all rendered with correct copy. Grid: 4 columns (284px × 4). All 4 cards have correct testids + sub-testids (name/price/features/cta). Cards verified — Start: Free / 5 features / 'Start Free' CTA; Analyze: €49 / report / 8 features / 'Analyze Property'; Pro: €149 / month / 8 features / 'Upgrade to Pro' + POPULAR ribbon (pricing-card-pro-popular visible); Scale: Custom / 8 features / 'Contact Sales'. Outcome section: kicker + headline + 6 outcome cards (Discover hidden upside, Optimize asset performance, Outperform local markets, Increase hospitality revenue, De-risk acquisitions, Upgrade underperforming assets) all present. Trust footer 'Stripe secured · GDPR compliant · No data resale' verified. Hover spotlight opacity 0→1 confirmed on group-hover. CTA wiring verified via network interception: analyze + pro POST /api/payments/checkout with correct {tier, origin_url} payload; start navigates to /invest. Nav theming: /pricing nav bg = rgba(10,11,15,0.78) [dark], all other routes (/, /invest, /operate, /portfolio/demo, /market-trends) nav bg = rgba(249,248,246,0.85) [light]. Brand 'Propul8.' visible across all routes.

issues: Site Footer (parchment/light theme) sits directly under the dark Pricing canvas creating a hard visual seam. Iter63 brief acknowledged this is acceptable for now — user can request a dark Footer variant if desired.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Add a dark-mode Footer variant for /pricing to remove the parchment/dark seam at the bottom of the page.
critical_code_review_comments: Pricing.jsx (~580 lines) is clean, self-contained, and within the 700-line guideline. Glass cards use inline styles for the parallax spotlight (--mx/--my CSS vars set via onMouseMove) — performant, no measurable re-renders.

scale CTA uses window.location.href = 'mailto:...' which Playwright cannot intercept as a network request (browsers hand mailto off to the OS). Verified behavioural correctness via static inspection of handleClick(tier) in Pricing.jsx (line 152-155) — link target is correct.
server.py PRICING_TIERS keeps both new + legacy keys in a single dict (no separate alias map) — pragmatic but means alias rename later will need careful migration. Acceptable for now.
server.py is still ~4500 lines (carryover comment from iter62) — past the 700-line guideline; modular split still recommended for long-term maintainability.

Free-tier short-circuit returns HTTP 400 'Free tier requires no checkout'. Frontend correctly never calls /payments/checkout for 'start' (handled via navigate('/invest')) and 'scale' (mailto), so the 400 is unreachable in normal flows — defensive only.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all iter63 pricing mandate elements verified across /pricing + nav theming regression across /, /invest, /operate, /portfolio/demo, /market-trends

test_credentials: None — all flows tested via public demo routes; Stripe checkout calls were intercepted in the browser via page.route() to avoid hitting live Stripe.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iter63_pricing.py is the iter63 regression file. PRICING_TIERS dict contains both new (start/analyze/pro/scale) AND legacy (free/investor/developer) keys; amount==0 tiers (start/scale/free/developer) intentionally return 400 from /api/payments/checkout (frontend short-circuits before calling). To verify CTA wiring without touching live Stripe, intercept POST /api/payments/checkout via page.route() and fulfill a stub {url, session_id} JSON — both analyze + pro fire the call with payload {tier, origin_url:window.location.origin}. /pricing nav uses dark shell (rgba(10,11,15,0.78)); all other routes use light parchment shell — confirmed via isPricing flag in Nav.jsx (only /pricing triggers dark, NOT /invest or /dashboard anymore). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is https://hospitality-ai-12.preview.emergentagent.com.
